📋 Event Overview

RCD Mallorca vs Real Betis takes place at Estadi Mallorca Son Moix on 2026-02-15 as part of the Spanish La Liga. Tickets available from USD49.34.

Estadi Mallorca Son Moix is one of the premier sporting venues in Estadi Mallorca Son Moix, offering fans an unforgettable atmosphere. This Football event is part of the Spanish La Liga season and attracts supporters from across the country.

Tickets for RCD Mallorca vs Real Betis are available from $49 per ticket. We compare prices across all major resale and official platforms so you can find the best deal without the hassle.
